source_gate.official_dol_eta_archive_result: Dated ETA weekly claims release pages are available through the official DOL newsroom archive and can support point-in-time release mapping.
source_gate.alfred_result: Public ALFRED page documents archival/vintage initial-claims series availability; programmatic vintage API was not used because it requires an external credential.
limitations: No durable historical release parser was built in this bounded pass.
No release-time calendar normalization or holiday handling was implemented.
No consensus-expectations source was used or assumed.

data_source.claims_source: official DOL/ETA dated weekly claims releases for future ETL

evaluation.reason: Bounded recovery stopped after source-vintage feasibility gate; no long backtest was run.
evaluation.next_step: Build official DOL/ETA dated-release parser and run no-CSV real ETF performance controls.

model_wrapper.generate_signals_behavior: returns explicit zero weights for the selected ETF universe
